channel.title: Use Case Intel — Threat Intel Feed
channel.description: High-fidelity IOCs aggregated from The Hacker News, BleepingComputer, Microsoft Security Blog and CISA KEV. Refreshed daily. CVEs/hashes via regex; domains/IPs only when defanged by the source author.

item.title: [CVE/CRIT] CVE-2026-3854
item.description:
CVE: CVE-2026-3854

Severity: crit · First seen: 2026-05-06 · Sources: The Hacker News

Context: Google's Android Apps Get Public Verification to Stop Supply Chain Attacks

item.title: [CVE/CRIT] CVE-2026-33626
item.description:
CVE: CVE-2026-33626

Severity: crit · First seen: 2026-05-06 · Sources: The Hacker News

Context: Google's Android Apps Get Public Verification to Stop Supply Chain Attacks

item.description:

item.title: [CVE/CRIT] CVE-2026-0300
item.description:
CVE: CVE-2026-0300

Severity: crit · First seen: 2026-05-06 · Sources: BleepingComputer, The Hacker News, Cyber Security News

Context: Palo Alto Networks warns of firewall RCE zero-day exploited in attacks
